titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ الْأَمَةُ فَيُطَلِّقُهَا ثُمَّ يَشْتَرِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The man happens to have a slave girl with him, so he divorces her, then he buys her

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ الْأَمَةُ فَيُطَلِّقُهَا ثُمَّ يَشْتَرِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The man happens to have a slave girl with him, so he divorces her, then he buys her

segments: فِي رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ تَحْتَهُ أَمَةٌ فَطَلَّقَهَا عَلَى السُّنَّةِ ثُمَّ بَانَتْ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنْكِحَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ قَالَ قَدْ قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي هَذَا أَحَلَّتْهَا آيَةٌ وَ حَرَّمَتْهَا آيَةٌ أُخْرَى وَ أَنَا نَاهٍ عَنْهَا نَفْسِي وَ وُلْدِي .
arabic.text: فِي رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ تَحْتَهُ أَمَةٌ فَطَلَّقَهَا عَلَى السُّنَّةِ ثُمَّ بَانَتْ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنْكِحَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ قَالَ قَدْ قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي هَذَا أَحَلَّتْهَا آيَةٌ وَ حَرَّمَتْهَا آيَةٌ أُخْرَى وَ أَنَا نَاهٍ عَنْهَا نَفْسِي وَ وُلْدِي .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from one of his companions, from Ibn Abu Najran, and Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said regarding a man under who used to be a slave girl. So he divorced her upon the Sunnah, then she was irrevocably divorced from him. They he bought her after that before she married another husband. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> had judged regarding this (as there is) A Verse Permits her and another Verse Prohibits her, and I<sup>asws</sup> would prohibit from her myself<sup>asws</sup> and my<sup>asws</sup> sons<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from one of his companions, from Ibn Abu Najran, and Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said regarding a man under who used to be a slave girl. So he divorced her upon the Sunnah, then she was irrevocably divorced from him. They he bought her after that before she married another husband. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> had judged regarding this (as there is) A Verse Permits her and another Verse Prohibits her, and I<sup>asws</sup> would prohibit from her myself<sup>asws</sup> and my<sup>asws</sup> sons<sup>asws</sup>’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ وَ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ الْأَمَةُ فَيُطَلِّقُهَا ثُمَّ يَشْتَرِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The man happens to have a slave girl with him, so he divorces her, then he buys her

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ حُرٍّ كَانَتْ تَحْتَهُ أَمَةٌ فَطَلَّقَهَا طَلَاقاً بَائِناً ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا هَلْ يَحِلُّ لَهُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا قَالَ لَا .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ حُرٍّ كَانَتْ تَحْتَهُ أَمَةٌ فَطَلَّقَهَا طَلَاقاً بَائِناً ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا هَلْ يَحِلُّ لَهُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا قَالَ لَا .

segments: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a free man who had a slave girl under him. So he divorced her with an irrevocable divorce, then bought her. Is it Permissible for him that he copulates with her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a free man who had a slave girl under him. So he divorced her with an irrevocable divorce, then bought her. Is it Permissible for him that he copulates with her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيٌّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ الْأَمَةُ فَيُطَلِّقُهَا ثُمَّ يَشْتَرِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The man happens to have a slave girl with him, so he divorces her, then he buys her

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ امْرَأَةً مَمْلُوكَةً ثُمَّ طَلَّقَهَا ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا بَعْدُ هَلْ تَحِلُّ لَهُ قَالَ لَا حَتَّى تَنْكِحَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ امْرَأَةً مَمْلُوكَةً ثُمَّ طَلَّقَهَا ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا بَعْدُ هَلْ تَحِلُّ لَهُ قَالَ لَا حَتَّى تَنْكِحَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married an owned woman, then divorced her, then bought her afterwards. Is she Permissible for him?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, until she marries another husband’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married an owned woman, then divorced her, then bought her afterwards. Is she Permissible for him?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, until she marries another husband’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ جَمِيعاً عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ الْأَمَةُ فَيُطَلِّقُهَا ثُمَّ يَشْتَرِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 79 – The man happens to have a slave girl with him, so he divorces her, then he buys her

segments: فِي رَجُلٍ تَحْتَهُ أَمَةٌ فَطَلَّقَهَا تَطْلِيقَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا بَعْدُ قَالَ لَا يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يَنْكِحَهَا حَتَّى تَتَزَوَّجَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ وَ حَتَّى يَدْخُلَ بِهَا فِي مِثْلِ مَا خَرَجَتْ مِنْهُ .
arabic.text: فِي رَجُلٍ تَحْتَهُ أَمَةٌ فَطَلَّقَهَا تَطْلِيقَتَيْنِ ثُمَّ اشْتَرَاهَا بَعْدُ قَالَ لَا يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يَنْكِحَهَا حَتَّى تَتَزَوَّجَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ وَ حَتَّى يَدْخُلَ بِهَا فِي مِثْلِ مَا خَرَجَتْ مِنْهُ .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban Bin Usman, from Bureyd Al Ajaly,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said regarding a man under whom is a slave girl. So he divorces her with two divorces, then buys her afterwards. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not correct for him that he marries her until she marries another husband, and until he copulates with her similar to what she went out from him’.
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban Bin Usman, from Bureyd Al Ajaly,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said regarding a man under whom is a slave girl. So he divorces her with two divorces, then buys her afterwards. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not correct for him that he marries her until she marries another husband, and until he copulates with her similar to what she went out from him’.

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ الْعِجْلِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ
